services.title: Home Dog Boarding
services.description: Our home boarding provides a calm home from home stay where your dog lives as part of the family, enjoying their usual routines, daily walks, enrichment and plenty of love and attention while you’re away

additionalPricing.heading: Additional dogs from the same household

services.note: Additional charges apply for puppies under 12 months.

services.title: Day Care
services.description: Our ad-hoc doggy day care offers flexible, occasional care for days when you need a little extra help, giving your dog a safe, fun and relaxed place to spend the day with plenty of walks, play, enrichment and companionship
services.note: Additional charges apply for puppies under 12 months.

otherServices.description: Katie's K9s also offers an array of other services including wedding chaperone, pet taxi and vet transportation. Whatever your requirements, please don't hesitate to get in touch for more details and a quote.

criteria.intro: To ensure the safety, wellbeing and happiness of every dog in our care, we ask that all dogs meet the following criteria:
items: Fully vaccinated and up to date with routine vaccinations
Up to date with flea and worming treatments
Friendly and happy to socialise with other dogs
Comfortable in a home environment and able to settle indoors
Not showing aggressive behaviour towards people or other dogs
criteria.closing:
At Katie's K9s, we intentionally care for only a small number of dogs at any one time. This helps us to maintain a calm and relaxed environment where dogs can settle comfortably and receive plenty of individual interaction, enrichment and affection throughout the day. It also means we can get to know each dog's personality, routine and needs so that their stay truly feels like a home-from-home experience.

If you have any questions about the process or would like to enquire about availability, we would love to hear from you.
